description: The Set Reference component is internally used by the Undo System for setting and reverting a Reference.

fields.TargetBefore: The reference value before the change.
fields.TargetAfter: The reference value after the change.
fields._performed: Whether the undo step was done or undone.
fields._description: The description of the change that was made and what to for the context menu label text when undoing/redoing.

usage: Not used directly by the user.
